name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: File Download Using ProtocolHandler
notes:
This Building Block detects usage of "ProtocolHandler" to download files. Downloaded files will be located in the cache folder.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: frack113
SIGMA Title: File Download Using ProtocolHandler.exe
SIGMA Description: Detects usage of "ProtocolHandler" to download files. Downloaded files will be located in the cache folder (for example - %LOCALAPPDATA%\Microsoft\Windows\INetCache\IE)


Confidence: LOW

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: File Download Using ProtocolHandler on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of [protocolhandler.exe or ProtocolHandler.exe]
when the event matches ((LOWER("Command") LIKE '%"ms-word%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.docx"%') OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '% http%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: File Download Using ProtocolHandler on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
AND when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of [protocolhandler.exe or ProtocolHandler.exe]
AND when the event matches ((LOWER("Command") LIKE '%"ms-word%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.docx"%') OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '% http%') AQL filter query
